name: Dr. Markus Braun
involvement_summary: Dr. Markus Braun is a German philosopher who was directly interviewed by KuchenTV in multiple 'Ungescriptet' episodes. They discussed topics like existentialism, free will, and the meaning of life. KuchenTV has had personal meetings and recorded conversations with Dr. Braun for his philosophy-focused content.
key_events: Discussions on existentialism and free will
